verses.text: And, behold, a certain lawyer stood up, and tempted him, saying, Master, what shall I do to inherit life?
He said unto him, What is written in the law? how readest thou?
And he answering said, Thou shalt love the Lord thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy strength.
And he said unto him, Thou hast answered right: this do, and thou shalt live.

section: To Inherit Long Life on Earth
